IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO ACHIEVE EQUITY, POLITICAL RIGHTS, AND SOCIAL INCLUSION (CONTINUED ON SCH O)BY ADVANCING POLICIES AND PRACTICES THAT EXPAND HUMAN AND CIVIL RIGHTS, ELIMINATE DISCRIMINATION, AND ACCELERATE THE WELL-BEING, EDUCATION, AND ECONOMIC SECURITY OF BLACK PEOPLE AND ALL PERSONS OF COLOR.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO ACHIEVE EQUITY, POLITICAL RIGHTS, AND SOCIAL INCLUSION BY ADVANCING POLICIES AND PRACTICES THAT EXPAND HUMAN AND CIVIL RIGHTS, ELIMINATE DISCRIMINATION, AND ACCELERATE THE WELL-BEING, EDUCATION, AND ECONOMIC SECURITY OF BLACK PEOPLE AND ALL PERSONS OF COLOR.
IRS990.Desc: THE NAACP NETWORK OF ACTIVISTS IS STRONG. THROUGH OUR UNITS, WE ARE IN COMMUNITY MEETINGS AND BOARDROOMS, COLLEGE CAMPUSES, CAPITOL HILL AND STATEHOUSES, ADVOCATING TO BUILD BLACK POLITICAL, SOCIAL, AND ECONOMIC POWER TO END RACIAL INJUSTICE AND MAKING SURE FEDERAL POLICIES REFLECT THE DIVERSE VOICES THEY IMPACT. OUR UNITS ARE DOING THE WORK ON A LOCAL, STATE AND REGIONAL LEVEL, POWERING THE MOVEMENT FOR CHANGE IN THE FOLLOWING AREAS: 1. RACE & JUSTICE - STRUCTURAL DISCRIMINATION AND UNJUST POLICING, PROSECUTION, AND INCARCERATION PRACTICES UNFAIRLY IMPACT BLACK COMMUNITIES. 2. HEALTH & WELL-BEING - BLACK HEALTH MATTERS, AND OUR WORK ON BEHALF OF FAMILIES HAS NEVER BEEN MORE URGENT. (CONTINUED ON SCHEDULE O)3. INCLUSIVE ECONOMY - ECONOMIC EQUITY IS CRUCIAL TO RACIAL EQUITY. AN INCLUSIVE ECONOMY MEANS EVERYONE CAN CONTRIBUTE AND EARN WITH FAIR ACCESS TO RESOURCES AND OPPORTUNITY. 4. ADVOCACY & LITIGATION - THE PATH TO JUSTICE REQUIRES THAT WE CHALLENGE FEDERAL, STATE, AND LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, AND POLICIES TO ENSURE EQUAL PROTECTION. OUR UNITS ARE SHAPING THE NEXT GENERATION OF ACTIVISTS, AND WE INVEST IN THEM WITH TRAINING, FELLOWSHIP, AND SCHOLARSHIPS.

Form990PartVIISectionAGrp.PersonNm: DR JABARI JAMES V POE PREMPEH

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: NAACP UNITS AWARD SCHOLARSHIPS BASED ON A NEED AND MERIT BASIS. SCHOLARSHIP RECIPIENTS MAY BE REQUESTED TO PROVIDE PROOF OF CONTINUED ACADEMIC PERFORMANCE AND ACHIEVEMENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ANY PERSON WHO IS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE PRINCIPLES AND POLICIES OF THE ASSOCIATION MAY BECOME A MEMBER OF THIS ASSOCIATION WITH CONSENT OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS, BY ACCEPTING THE TERMS OF THE CONSTITUTION OF THE NATIONAL ASSOCIATION FOR THE ADVANCEMENT OF COLORED PEOPLE AND THE BYLAWS FOR UNITS, AND BY PAYING ANNUALLY IN ADVANCE THE REQUISITE MEMBERSHIP FEES AS PRESCRIBED BY THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS. MEMBERSHIP IN THE UNITS SHALL INCLUDE MEMBERSHIP IN THE NATIONAL ASSOCIATION. MEMBERS OF NAACP UNITS ARE ENCOURAGED TO SUPPORT THE ASSOCIATION AND COOPERATE TO CONSERVE RESOURCES IN PURSUIT OF THE NAACP'S MISSION AND GOALS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: MEMBERS OF THE ORGANIZATION VOTE FOR THEIR ELECTED OFFICERS WHO FORM THE VOTING BODIES OF THE UNITS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ALL GOVERNANCE IS PROVIDED TO THE UNITS BY THE NATIONAL OFFICE CONSTITUTION, UNIT BYLAWS AND UNIT BOOKKEEPING GUIDE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 RETURN IS REVIEWED BY THE AUDIT COMMITTEE AND THE NATIONAL OFFICE'S CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER AND APPROVED PRIOR TO ITS FILING WITH THE IRS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: EACH UNIT'S OFFICERS ARE REQUIRED TO ATTEND MANDATORY TRAINING. THE MANDATORY TRAINING INCORPORATES NAACP'S ESTABLISHED GUIDELINES, RULES, AND REGULATIONS, INCLUDING FINANCIAL POLICIES AND PROCEDURES. ALL UNITS ARE REQUIRED TO CONDUCT SELF AUDITS ON AN ANNUAL BASIS AND THE NATIONAL NAACP CONDUCTS AUDITS OF SELECTED NAACP UNITS TO ENSURE THAT THE UNITS ARE OPERATING WITHIN THE GUIDELINES ESTABLISHED BY THE NATIONAL OFFICE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICTS OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE MADE AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.

SOME INDIVIDUALS MAY HOLD MULTIPLE POSITIONS FOR UNITS, THE STATE CONFERENCE, A YOUTH ADVISOR OR AS A TEMPORARY CUSTODIAN POSITION. THE GROUP IS PRESENTING THE PRESIDENT, SECRETARY AND TREASURER OF EACH CHAPTER IN PART VII AS THOSE WHO HAVE VOTING AUTHORITY.
UNRECONCILED CHANGES IN CASH ACCOUNTS OF SUBSIDIARIES -2,034,397.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART XI, LINE 9, CHANGES IN NET ASSETS
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE SUBORDINATE ORGANIZATIONS INCLUDED ON THE FORM 990 CHANGE ANNUALLY WHICH CAUSES THE NET ASSETS TO FLUCTUATE DEPENDING ON WHICH SUBORDINATES ARE INCLUDED.
